title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Shree Cement

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Shree Cement
jsonLd.description:
We at Shree Cement are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shree Cement:
Shree Cement is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
